page.title: Pending Review
page.description: Review and correct AI extraction results
page.documentNotFoundDesc: The specified document does not exist or has been deleted.

detail.loadFailedDesc: Unable to load review data. Please try again later.

dialog.approveMessage: Are you sure you want to approve this extraction result?
dialog.escalateMessage: Please explain why this needs supervisor review
dialog.unsavedChangesDesc: You have unsaved changes. Leaving this page will lose these changes. Are you sure you want to leave?

queue.loadFailedDesc: Unable to load review queue. Please try again.

approval.confirmDesc: You are about to confirm the {mode} result for this document.
approval.fieldsConfirmed: {count} fields will be marked as confirmed.
approval.afterConfirm: After confirmation, document status will be updated to "Approved" and audit log will be recorded.

toast.escalationNotified: Super User notified to handle this case

fieldMeta.sourcePositionTooltip: Click to view source position in PDF (page {page})

reviewActions.quickReviewHint: Quick Review Mode: only confirm fields needing attention
reviewActions.fullReviewHint: Full Review Mode: please check all fields carefully
reviewActions.confirmTooltipReady: Confirm {count} fields as correct; document will be marked as approved

quickReview.title: Quick Review Mode
quickReview.summary: System auto-confirmed {high} high-confidence fields. Please review the following {needsReview} fields needing attention.
quickReview.allHighConfidence: All fields are high confidence; you can confirm directly

correctionType.dialogDesc: Please select a type for the following {count} corrections. Normal corrections are used for system learning; exception corrections do not affect learning statistics.
correctionType.normalDesc1: This correction will be recorded for system learning to help improve future automatic recognition accuracy.
correctionType.normalDesc2: When the same field accumulates enough corrections, the system will automatically suggest new mapping rules.
correctionType.exceptionDesc1: This correction is a special case and will not affect system learning statistics.
correctionType.exceptionDesc2: Suitable for one-time errors, special formats, or cases that should not be used as rule references.
correctionType.exceptionReasonPlaceholder: Explain why this correction is an exception...

description.high: High extraction reliability, usually no modification needed
description.low: Requires careful review and possible correction

rejection.title: Reject Rule Suggestion
rejection.description: Please select a rejection reason and provide details to help improve rule learning.
rejection.detailPlaceholder: Please provide details for the rejection, e.g.: Sample size is insufficient to validate the rule's effectiveness...

INSUFFICIENT_DATA.label: Insufficient Data
INSUFFICIENT_DATA.description: Sample size is insufficient to validate the rule's effectiveness

POOR_ACCURACY.label: Poor Accuracy
POOR_ACCURACY.description: Simulation testing shows the rule accuracy does not meet the standard

HIGH_RISK.label: High Risk
HIGH_RISK.description: Impact analysis shows the potential risk is too high

DUPLICATE.label: Duplicate Rule
DUPLICATE.description: A rule with the same or similar functionality already exists

NOT_APPLICABLE.label: Not Applicable
NOT_APPLICABLE.description: The rule does not apply to the target scenario

OTHER.label: Other
OTHER.description: Other reason (please specify in the details)
